title: Row
summary: The standard list cell: leading icon, title (+ subtitle), trailing switch or chevron.

fields.name: icon
fields.notes: Leading Lucide icon name (device icon subset).

fields.name: page ref
fields.notes: Swipe-up page ref ("app.export"): tap opens that page (v13 #358).

fields.name: spinner
fields.notes: 1 = leading live arc spinner replaces the icon (working glyph, v13 #358).

notes: The zui.h trailing value (val), icon color and custom icon image fields have no CBOR keys.
v13 #358: pg rows also render a trailing chevron; pre-v13 decoders skip pg/sp (inert row).
